# netbox_fhrp_group (Data Source)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "netbox_fhrp_group" "test" {
  protocol    = "vrrp"
  group_id    = 1234
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `protocol` (String)

### Read-Only

- `auth_key` (String)
- `auth_type` (String)
- `comments` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `tags` (Set of String)
